heldOutUnit: template-type x concept (MAJOR 6): the PRIMARY endpoint is concept cloze accuracy computed ONLY over heldOut definitional types x all scoreable concepts; dev types are for tuning/monitoring and are descriptive
scoring: candidate-restricted cloze: logits at the {c} slot position, argmax over the 54 concept-token ids; teacher-forced left context = frame text up to the slot with {gloss} filled from kernel-v0 gloss (verbatim, lowercased by the tokenizer)
glossNote: glosses may contain other concepts' surface words (reference-bearing kernel entries); frames are machine-checked concept-leak-free, glosses are fixed data identical across arms and covered by the step-0 circularity baseline

probe.note: probe stimuli; linear probe reads MID-LAYER hidden state at the pre-registered NON-concept position = final word token of the sentence (circularity guard: probes only on mid-layer states at non-concept positions)
